title: Credit Denied
content:
{{Top|rwm|ncl}}
{{Canceled|short stories}}
"'''Credit Denied'''" was a short story slated to appear in the cancelled [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 16|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 16]]. The story synopsis was that [[Rendra Maex]] and her partner, [[Nopul Etrefa]], run into crimelord [[Oro Memis]] and his henchman [[Vakir'sa'jaina]] at a temple. Maex's partner is killed by the thug's blasters, and Maex is forced into a death match by a [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] announcer, [[Pon Svale]]. She is chained to a pole and is about to be shot, but manages to escape.
